productDisplayName: Rockport Women Jeanie Oneband Brown Flats
description: Crafted for the woman who never compromises on style and comfort, the Jeanie One Band sandal from rockport makes for a fab addition to your wardrobe. With a sleek design and simple silhouette it works great with all kinds of clothing.UpperSoft leather midfoot strap with brand logo embossed on topPull loop on the strap for easy on/offErgonomically padded suede footbed for exemplary comfortOutsoleTPU outsole with brand logo styled grooves on the forefoot and horizontal grooves on the mildly raised heel for absolute grip and tractionSandal careWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustUse a suede brush to clean the footbedDo not store in direct sunlight
